# Architecture Decision Records

<!-- Generated by seed-golden-context | Last updated: 2026-05-11 -->

This directory contains Architecture Decision Records (ADRs) for ContentfulBundle. Each ADR captures a significant design decision: what was chosen, why, and what trade-offs were accepted.

Before proposing architectural changes, check whether a relevant ADR exists. If a decision has an ADR, read it before relitigating.

## Index

| ADR | Title | Status |
|---|---|---|
| [0001](./0001-symfony-bundle-pattern.md) | Symfony Bundle Pattern for Contentful PHP Integration | Accepted |
| [0002](./0002-delivery-api-only-no-cma.md) | Delivery API Only — No Content Management API Integration | Accepted |
| [0003](./0003-psr-standards-for-cache-and-logger.md) | PSR-6 Cache and PSR-3 Logger — Standards-Based Injection | Accepted |
| [0004](./0004-profiler-controller-compiler-pass.md) | ProfilerController Registered Conditionally via Compiler Pass | Accepted |
| [0005](./0005-named-multi-client-config-one-default.md) | Named Multi-Client Configuration with Exactly-One-Default Invariant | Accepted |
| [0006](./0006-separate-query-cache-from-resource-cache.md) | Query Cache Separate from Resource Cache | Accepted |

## Adding a New ADR

Copy the template structure from any existing ADR. Use the next sequential number. Status should be `Accepted`, `Superseded by ADR-XXXX`, or `Deprecated`.
